title: English Teacher
status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Teaching License with Language Arts or English Endorsement for Grades 7-12.  No endorsement is required for an Elementary Education License teaching Language Arts Grade 6.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. To estimate possible step placement on the TT Salary Schedule, select following linkTT Step Placement Calculator.Attachment(s):Secondary Education Teacher.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
